name: reposeiri
description: Codex adapter for RepoSeiri repository audit, dry-run planning, and PR draft context.

interface.shortDescription: Draft repository quality reviews from RepoSeiri Rust core outputs.
interface.longDescription: RepoSeiri uses a Rust core to audit repository trust routes, generate dry-run patch plans, and render Codex-facing review context and draft PR bodies without rewriting core logic in the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Show safe and blocked repo fixes.
